headline: Issue of Equity
summary: Foresight VCT PLCLEI: 213800GNTY699WHACF46 Issue of EquityAllotment of Ordinary Shares20 March 2026 The Board of Foresight VCT plc (“the Company”) is pleased to announce that 139,483 Ordinary Shares of 1p each in the capital of the Company (“the Shares”) were allotted on 20 March 2026 pursuant to the offer for subscription (“the Offer”) contained in the prospectus issued by the Company dated 14 January 2026. The Shares were issued at offer prices based on an unaudited net asset value of 71.10 pe
